name: TakeProfitTrader
description_short: Futures-only prop firm with one-step evaluations, daily payouts, no daily loss limits, and up to 90% profit splits on $25K–$150K simulated accounts.
description_long:
TakeProfitTrader (TPT) is a futures-focused proprietary trading firm founded in 2021 by James Sixsmith, a former professional hockey player turned full-time trader. Based in Windermere, Florida, TPT offers simulated funded accounts ranging from $25,000 to $150,000 for traders looking to prove their skills and trade with firm capital — without risking their own money on live markets. With over 8,300 Trustpilot reviews averaging 4.4 out of 5 stars, TPT has built one of the stronger reputations in the competitive funded futures space.

The evaluation is a streamlined one-step challenge requiring a minimum of 5 trading days and a 6% profit target, with no maximum time limit. One of TPT's most notable differentiators is the removal of daily loss limits (as of January 2025), replaced by a trailing max drawdown rule only. A 50% consistency rule applies — no single trading day may account for more than half your total profits — designed to promote sustainable trading habits rather than rewarding lucky one-day windfalls.

PROFIT splits are 80/20 on PRO accounts and 90/10 on PRO+ accounts, with no cap on withdrawal amounts. TPT stands out for offering daily payouts — among the fastest in the funded futures industry — with withdrawals processed within 12–24 business hours via Plaid (US bank transfer), PayPal, or Wise for international traders. Withdrawals above $250 are free; a $50 fee applies to smaller amounts. PRO accounts allow day-one withdrawals after building a buffer to the max drawdown level.

Traders access accounts through NinjaTrader 8, Tradovate, or Rithmic — covering everything from advanced charting to low-latency institutional execution. TPT supports a broad range of CME Group futures markets including stock index futures (ES, NQ, YM), energy (CL, NG), metals (GC, SI), agricultural, and Treasury futures. Automated trading is possible via third-party connectors such as TradersPost. Pricing ranges from $90/month for a $25K PRO account up to $360/month for a $150K PRO+ account, with frequent promotional discounts of 40–50% off.
affiliate_commission: 10% to 25% of referred subscription revenue (4 tiers based on monthly referral volume)
pros: Daily payouts with no maximum withdrawal cap — rare among futures prop firms
No daily loss limit (removed January 2025), only a trailing max drawdown applies
Simple one-step evaluation with no time limit and a clear 6% profit target
90/10 profit split available on PRO+ accounts
Strong Trustpilot reputation: 4.4/5 from 8,300+ reviews with 81% five-star
cons: Futures only — no stocks, forex, crypto, or options supported
50% consistency rule limits aggressive single-session trading strategies
No dedicated mobile app; mobile access depends on Tradovate's platform
$50 withdrawal fee applies to payouts of $250 or less
